section.div: Optimized Ollama LLM server configuration for Mac Studio and other Apple Silicon Macs. Headless setup with automatic startup, resource optimization, and remote management via SSH.
Private AI platform for agents, assistants and enterprise search. Built-in Agent Builder, Deep research, Document analysis, Multi-model support, and API connectivity for agents.
